name: Jump
ai_strategy_summary: Jump is the category leader in advisor AI — #1 in advisor satisfaction and adoption in both the 2025 and 2026 T3/Inside Information Software Surveys, with 27,000+ advisors on the platform. Founded in 2023, Jump grew from zero to 27,000 advisors in two years on an $80M Series B led by Insight Partners. The platform has three product pillars: Meet (meeting intelligence), Grow (organic growth acceleration), and Operate (back-office automation). In March 2026, Jump launched AI Associate — an agentic execution layer that moves beyond surfacing insights to taking direct action across CRM, email, and financial planning systems. This makes Jump the first advisor AI platform to cross from passive intelligence into agentic execution. COO Tim Chaves framed the shift: 'The industry doesn't just need more insights — it needs execution.'
headline_metric: 27,000+ advisors; #1 T3 Survey satisfaction 2025 & 2026; $80M Series B; 20+ AI features; agentic execution live
headline_initiative: AI Associate (agentic execution) + Meet/Grow/Operate product architecture

advisor_productivity.headline: 27,000+ advisors, #1 satisfaction, AI Associate crosses from insights to agentic execution
advisor_productivity.detail: Jump's AI Operating System provides 20+ AI-powered features across three pillars: Meet (meeting intelligence with action items), Grow (organic client acquisition acceleration), and Operate (back-office workflow automation). The March 2026 launch of AI Associate added an agentic execution layer — the AI now updates CRM records, drafts and sends client emails with full context, schedules follow-ups, logs life events, and assigns tasks, all with human-in-the-loop compliance. This makes Jump the first advisor AI to cross from passive intelligence into autonomous workflow execution.
evidence: #1 advisor satisfaction and adoption: T3/Inside Information Survey 2025 and 2026 (Business Wire)
AI Associate: agentic execution across CRM, email, planning tools (Business Wire, March 2026)
Three pillars: Meet, Grow, Operate (Jump blog)
$80M Series B led by Insight Partners (Business Wire, Feb 2026)
COO Tim Chaves: 'industry needs execution not just insights' (Business Wire)

operations_compliance.headline: AI Associate automates CRM updates, follow-ups, task assignment with human-in-the-loop compliance
operations_compliance.detail: AI Associate's agentic execution layer handles CRM record updates, email drafting and sending, meeting scheduling, and life event logging — all with enterprise-grade compliance standards requiring human-in-the-loop confirmation before actions execute. This puts Jump ahead of other advisor tools on compliance-aware automation.
evidence: Enterprise-grade compliance with human-in-the-loop confirmation (Business Wire)
CRM updates, email drafting, task assignment automated (Business Wire, March 2026)

client_acquisition.headline: Grow pillar: AI-powered organic growth acceleration for advisors
client_acquisition.detail: Jump's Grow pillar specifically targets organic client acquisition — using AI to identify growth opportunities, surface referral leads, and accelerate prospect engagement. This is a unique focus area among advisor tools; most competitors focus on productivity (meeting notes, CRM) rather than growth.
evidence: Grow pillar: organic growth acceleration (Jump blog, Business Wire)

client_personalization.headline: No client-facing AI; Jump is advisor-only (B2B tool, not client-facing)
client_personalization.detail: Jump operates exclusively as an advisor-facing tool. It does not provide client-facing AI experiences (unlike Erica for BofA or Tori for eToro). The platform's value proposition is advisor productivity and workflow automation, not client self-service.
evidence: B2B advisor platform only — no client-facing AI disclosed
